q: What are the three levels of government?
q_fa: سه سطح دولت چه هستند؟
q_fr: What are the three levels of government?
book_text: The three levels of government in Canada are: federal, provincial (or territorial), and municipal (local).

q: What are the responsibilities of the federal government?
q_fa: مسئولیت‌های دولت فدرال چیست؟
q_fr: What are the responsibilities of the federal government?
book_text: The federal government is responsible for national defence, foreign policy, citizenship, and other matters of national concern.

q: Which of the following are the responsibilities of the provincial government?
q_fa: کدام یک از موارد زیر مسئولیت‌های دولت استانی است؟
q_fr: Which of the following are the responsibilities of the provincial government?
book_text: Provincial governments are responsible for education, health care, natural resources, and other matters within their provinces.

q: What are the three key characteristics of Canada's system of government?
q_fa: سه ویژگی کلیدی سیستم حکومتی کانادا چیست؟
q_fr: What are the three key characteristics of Canada's system of government?
book_text: Canada's system of government has three key characteristics: federalism, parliamentary democracy, and constitutional monarchy.

q: What do you call the Sovereign's representative in the provinces?
q_fa: نماینده حاکم در استان‌ها را چه می‌نامند؟
q_fr: What do you call the Sovereign's representative in the provinces?
book_text: The Sovereign's representative in the provinces is called the Lieutenant Governor.

q: Which level of government in Canada passes laws known as 'by-laws'?
q_fa: کدام سطح دولت در کانادا قوانینی به نام 'by-laws' تصویب می‌کند؟
q_fr: Which level of government in Canada passes laws known as 'by-laws'?
book_text: Municipal governments pass laws known as 'by-laws' to regulate local matters.

q: Who is Canada's head of state?
q_fa: رئیس دولت کانادا کیست؟
q_fr: Who is Canada's head of state?
book_text: The King or Queen (monarch) is Canada's head of state.

q: Who is Canada's head of government?
q_fa: رئیس دولت کانادا کیست؟
q_fr: Who is Canada's head of government?
book_text: The Prime Minister is Canada's head of government.

q: What is the role of the Governor General?
q_fa: نقش فرماندار کل چیست؟
q_fr: What is the role of the Governor General?
options: To represent the Crown in Canada
options_fr: To represent the Crown in Canada
book_text: The Governor General represents the Crown (monarch) in Canada.

q: Who appoints the Governor General?
q_fa: فرماندار کل را چه کسی منصوب می‌کند؟
q_fr: Who appoints the Governor General?
book_text: The Governor General is appointed by the King or Queen on the advice of the Prime Minister.

q: What is the name of the official residence of the Prime Minister?
q_fa: نام اقامتگاه رسمی نخست‌وزیر چیست؟
q_fr: What is the name of the official residence of the Prime Minister?
book_text: 24 Sussex Drive is the official residence of the Prime Minister of Canada.

q: What is the name of the official residence of the Governor General?
q_fa: نام اقامتگاه رسمی فرماندار کل چیست؟
q_fr: What is the name of the official residence of the Governor General?
book_text: Rideau Hall in Ottawa is the official residence of the Governor General.

q: Which of the following are responsibilities of the provincial government?
q_fa: کدام یک از موارد زیر از مسئولیت‌های دولت استانی است؟
q_fr: Which of the following are responsibilities of the provincial government?
book_text: Provincial governments are responsible for education, health care, and natural resources.

q: What does it mean to say that Canada is a constitutional monarchy?
q_fa: این که بگوییم کانادا یک سلطنت مشروطه است به چه معناست؟
q_fr: What does it mean to say that Canada is a constitutional monarchy?
options: Canada has a monarch as head of state
The monarch's powers are limited by the constitution
options_fr: Canada has a monarch as head of state
The monarch's powers are limited by the constitution
book_text: Canada is a constitutional monarchy, meaning it has a monarch as head of state, but the monarch's powers are limited by the constitution.

q: What is the difference between the role of the Queen and that of the Prime Minister?
q_fa: تفاوت نقش ملکه و نخست‌وزیر چیست؟
q_fr: What is the difference between the role of the Queen and that of the Prime Minister?
options: The Queen is head of state, Prime Minister is head of government
The Queen makes laws, PM enforces them
options_fr: The Queen is head of state, Prime Minister is head of government
The Queen makes laws, PM enforces them
book_text: The Queen is the head of state, while the Prime Minister is the head of government.

q: What are the three levels of government?
q_fa: سه سطح دولت چیست؟
q_fr: What are the three levels of government?
book_text: The three levels of government in Canada are: Federal, Provincial, and Municipal.

q: What is the government of all of Canada called?
q_fa: دولت کل کانادا چه نامیده می‌شود؟
q_fr: What is the government of all of Canada called?
book_text: The government of all of Canada is called the federal government.

q: What are the three key characteristics of Canada's system of government?
q_fa: سه ویژگی کلیدی سیستم دولت کانادا چیست؟
q_fr: What are the three key characteristics of Canada's system of government?
book_text: The three key characteristics of Canada's system of government are: Federalism, Parliamentary democracy, and Constitutional monarchy.

q: What do you call the Sovereign's representative in the provinces?
q_fa: نماینده حاکم در استان‌ها را چه می‌نامند؟
q_fr: What do you call the Sovereign's representative in the provinces?
book_text: The Sovereign's representative in the provinces is called the Lieutenant Governor.

q: What are the responsibilities of the federal government?
q_fa: مسئولیت‌های دولت فدرال چیست؟
q_fr: What are the responsibilities of the federal government?
options: National defence, foreign policy, immigration, citizenship
options_fr: National defence, foreign policy, immigration, citizenship
book_text: The federal government is responsible for national defence, foreign policy, immigration, and citizenship.

q: What does it mean to say that Canada is a constitutional monarchy?
q_fa: این که بگوییم کانادا یک سلطنت مشروطه است به چه معناست؟
q_fr: What does it mean to say that Canada is a constitutional monarchy?
options: Canada has a monarch as head of state
The monarch's powers are limited by the constitution
options_fr: Canada has a monarch as head of state
The monarch's powers are limited by the constitution
book_text: Canada is a constitutional monarchy, meaning it has a monarch as head of state, but the monarch's powers are limited by the constitution.

q: What is the difference between the role of the Queen and that of the Prime Minister?
q_fa: تفاوت نقش ملکه و نخست‌وزیر چیست؟
q_fr: What is the difference between the role of the Queen and that of the Prime Minister?
options: The Queen is head of state, Prime Minister is head of government
The Queen makes laws, PM enforces them
options_fr: The Queen is head of state, Prime Minister is head of government
The Queen makes laws, PM enforces them
book_text: The Queen is the head of state, while the Prime Minister is the head of government.

q: What are the three levels of government?
q_fa: سه سطح دولت چیست؟
q_fr: What are the three levels of government?
book_text: The three levels of government in Canada are: Federal, Provincial, and Municipal.

q: Is Canada a member of the Commonwealth?
q_fa: آیا کانادا عضو کشورهای مشترک‌المنافع است؟
q_fr: Is Canada a member of the Commonwealth?
book_text: Canada is a member of the Commonwealth of Nations.

q: What is a parliamentary democracy?
q_fa: دموکراسی پارلمانی چیست؟
q_fr: What is a parliamentary democracy?
options: A system where Parliament is the primary legislative body
A system where the President has all power
options_fr: A system where Parliament is the primary legislative body
A system where the President has all power
book_text: A parliamentary democracy is a system of government where Parliament is the primary legislative body.

q: What is a constitutional monarchy?
q_fa: سلطنت مشروطه چیست؟
q_fr: What is a constitutional monarchy?
options: A system where the monarch has unlimited power
A system where the King/Queen is head of state but power is limited by the constitution
options_fr: A system where the monarch has unlimited power
A system where the King/Queen is head of state but power is limited by the constitution
book_text: A constitutional monarchy is a system where the King/Queen is head of state but power is limited by the constitution.

q: What is federalism?
q_fa: فدرالیسم چیست؟
q_fr: What is federalism?
options: Division of power between federal and provincial governments
options_fr: Division of power between federal and provincial governments
book_text: Federalism is the division of power between federal and provincial governments.

q: What are the three levels of government in Canada?
q_fa: سه سطح دولت در کانادا چیست؟
q_fr: What are the three levels of government in Canada?
book_text: The three levels of government in Canada are: Federal, Provincial, and Municipal.

q: Who is your member of Parliament?
q_fa: عضو پارلمان شما کیست؟
q_fr: Who is your member of Parliament?
options: The person elected in your riding
options_fr: The person elected in your riding
book_text: Your member of Parliament is the person elected in your riding (electoral district) to represent you in the House of Commons.

q: How many members are in the House of Commons?
q_fa: مجلس عوام چند عضو دارد؟
q_fr: How many members are in the House of Commons?
book_text: The House of Commons has 338 members, elected by Canadians in federal elections.

q: How many senators are in the Senate?
q_fa: سنا چند سناتور دارد؟
q_fr: How many senators are in the Senate?
book_text: The Senate has 105 senators, appointed by the Governor General on the advice of the Prime Minister.

q: What is the name of the building where Parliament meets?
q_fa: نام ساختمانی که پارلمان در آن تشکیل جلسه می‌دهد چیست؟
q_fr: What is the name of the building where Parliament meets?
book_text: Parliament Hill in Ottawa is where the Parliament of Canada meets.

q: What is the name of the tower on Parliament Hill?
q_fa: نام برج روی تپه پارلمان چیست؟
q_fr: What is the name of the tower on Parliament Hill?
book_text: The Peace Tower is the iconic tower on Parliament Hill.

q: What is the name of the ceremony that marks the opening of Parliament?
q_fa: نام مراسمی که افتتاح پارلمان را نشان می‌دهد چیست؟
q_fr: What is the name of the ceremony that marks the opening of Parliament?
book_text: The Speech from the Throne marks the opening of each session of Parliament.

q: What is the name of the document that outlines the government's plans?
q_fa: نام سندی که برنامه‌های دولت را مشخص می‌کند چیست؟
q_fr: What is the name of the document that outlines the government's plans?
book_text: The Speech from the Throne outlines the government's plans for the upcoming session.

q: What are the three branches of government?
q_fa: سه شاخه دولت چیست؟
q_fr: What are the three branches of government?
book_text: The three branches of government are: Executive (Prime Minister and Cabinet), Legislative (Parliament), and Judicial (Courts).

q: What are the three branches of government?
q_fa: سه شاخه دولت چیست؟
q_fr: What are the three branches of government?
book_text: The three branches of government are: Executive (Prime Minister and Cabinet), Legislative (Parliament), and Judicial (Courts).

q: How many members are in the House of Commons?
q_fa: مجلس عوام چند عضو دارد؟
q_fr: How many members are in the House of Commons?
book_text: The House of Commons has 338 members, elected by Canadians in federal elections.

q: How many senators are in the Senate?
q_fa: سنا چند سناتور دارد؟
q_fr: How many senators are in the Senate?
book_text: The Senate has 105 senators, appointed by the Governor General on the advice of the Prime Minister.

q: What are the three branches of government in Canada?
q_fa: سه شاخه دولت در کانادا چیست؟
q_fr: What are the three branches of government in Canada?
book_text: The three branches of government are: Executive (Prime Minister and Cabinet), Legislative (Parliament), and Judicial (Courts).

q: What is the role of the Executive branch?
q_fa: نقش شاخه اجرایی چیست؟
q_fr: What is the role of the Executive branch?
options: To implement and enforce laws (Prime Minister and Cabinet)
options_fr: To implement and enforce laws (Prime Minister and Cabinet)
book_text: The Executive branch (Prime Minister and Cabinet) implements and enforces laws.

q: What do you call a law before it is passed?
q_fa: قبل از تصویب، قانون را چه می‌نامند؟
q_fr: What do you call a law before it is passed?
book_text: A law before it is passed is called a bill.

q: What is the final step before a bill becomes a law?
q_fa: آخرین مرحله قبل از تبدیل شدن یک لایحه به قانون چیست؟
q_fr: What is the final step before a bill becomes a law?
book_text: The final step before a bill becomes a law is Royal Assent, given by the Governor General or the monarch.

q: What is the name of the process by which a bill becomes a law?
q_fa: نام فرآیندی که یک لایحه به قانون تبدیل می‌شود چیست؟
q_fr: What is the name of the process by which a bill becomes a law?
book_text: A bill goes through the legislative process in Parliament and receives Royal Assent to become a law.

q: What is the final step before a bill becomes a law?
q_fa: آخرین مرحله قبل از تبدیل شدن یک لایحه به قانون چیست؟
q_fr: What is the final step before a bill becomes a law?
book_text: Royal Assent is the final step before a bill becomes a law.

q: What do you call a law before it is passed?
q_fa: قبل از تصویب شدن، یک قانون چه نامیده می‌شود؟
q_fr: What do you call a law before it is passed?
book_text: A law before it is passed is called a bill.

q: What is the name of the process by which a bill becomes a law?
q_fa: نام فرآیندی که یک لایحه به قانون تبدیل می‌شود چیست؟
q_fr: What is the name of the process by which a bill becomes a law?
book_text: A bill goes through the legislative process in Parliament and receives Royal Assent to become a law.

q: After an election, which party forms the government?
q_fa: پس از انتخابات، کدام حزب دولت را تشکیل می‌دهد؟
q_fr: After an election, which party forms the government?
options: The party with the most votes
The party with the most seats in the House of Commons
The party chosen by the Governor General
options_fr: The party with the most votes
The party with the most seats in the House of Commons
The party chosen by the Governor General
book_text: After an election, the party with the most seats in the House of Commons usually forms the government.

q: What is a minority government?
q_fa: دولت اقلیت چیست؟
q_fr: What is a minority government?
options: Government with less than 50% of seats
options_fr: Government with less than 50% of seats
book_text: A minority government is a government that has less than 50% of the seats in the House of Commons.

q: Which party is the Official Opposition at the federal level?
q_fa: کدام حزب اپوزیسیون رسمی در سطح فدرال است؟
q_fr: Which party is the Official Opposition at the federal level?
options: The party with the second most seats
The party chosen by the PM
options_fr: The party with the second most seats
The party chosen by the PM
book_text: The Official Opposition at the federal level is the party with the second most seats in the House of Commons.

q: What is a minority government?
q_fa: دولت اقلیت چیست؟
q_fr: What is a minority government?
options: A government with less than 50% of seats
options_fr: A government with less than 50% of seats
book_text: A minority government is one in which the governing party has fewer than half the seats in the House of Commons.

q: After an election, which party forms the government?
q_fa: پس از انتخابات، کدام حزب دولت را تشکیل می‌دهد؟
q_fr: After an election, which party forms the government?
options: The party with the most seats
The party chosen by the Governor General
options_fr: The party with the most seats
The party chosen by the Governor General
book_text: After an election, the party with the most seats in the House of Commons forms the government.

q: After an election, which party forms the government?
q_fa: پس از انتخابات، کدام حزب دولت را تشکیل می‌دهد؟
q_fr: After an election, which party forms the government?
options: The party with the most seats
The party chosen by the Governor General
options_fr: The party with the most seats
The party chosen by the Governor General
book_text: After an election, the party with the most seats in the House of Commons forms the government.

q: Which federal political party is His Majesty's Loyal Opposition?
q_fa: کدام حزب سیاسی فدرال مخالف وفادار اعلیحضرت است؟
q_fr: Which federal political party is His Majesty's Loyal Opposition?
options: The party with the second-largest number of seats in the House of Commons
The party with the most seats
options_fr: The party with the second-largest number of seats in the House of Commons
The party with the most seats
book_text: His Majesty's Loyal Opposition is the party with the second-largest number of seats in the House of Commons. The Official Opposition plays an important role in holding the government accountable.
